name: vHelp
short: Custom help formatter with scoped admin/owner help and VErrors integration.
description: vHelp replaces Red's default help system with a paginated, searchable help formatter. It supports scoped help pages (admin, owner), fuzzy search with suggestions, and integrates with vError for consistent error code display and internal error reporting.
install_msg: vHelp installed! The custom help formatter will activate automatically. Use `[p]help` as normal, and enjoy the upgraded paginated experience.
author: VantageOverlook
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end-user data. Help queries are processed in memory and not persisted.
